chunks.title: Law on False Prophets
chunks.reason: Establishes the penalty for a prophet who leads Israel to other gods despite performing signs.

chunks.title: Law on Family Enticement
chunks.reason: Details the strict judgment required when close relatives secretly entice others to idolatry.

chunks.title: Law on Wicked Cities
chunks.reason: Describes the procedure for investigating and destroying a whole city that has turned to idolatry.
